creator: bar@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ivan Klymenko from comment #4)

Can you show me the output of the following commands
  $ make showconfig -C /usr/ports/security/cryptopp/
  $ pkg info -lx cryptopp | grep lib

As far as I can remember, originally security/cryptopp was built as static library, than an option has been added defaulting to static, then the default changed (STATIC=off).
So I recently changed from BUILD_DEPENDS=libcryptopp.a to LIB_DEPENDS=libcryptopp.so to get the default.
